R0248.title: Mobile App Repackaging Fraud
R0248.definition: Attackers repackage apps to implant ads, phishing pages, or risk-control bypass logic.
R0248.description: Attackers repackage apps to implant ads, phishing pages, or risk-control bypass logic.
R0248.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
